package rulecoverage

func PositiveTimeAfterInLoop() string {
    ruleID := "time_after_in_loop"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "time.After(...) is allocated inside loops instead of reusing a timer or deadline."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
